task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Lead Router** (Level 7)

Build a lead routing API. Prospects submit leads (name, email, company, size). The server applies routing rules: SMB → alice, Mid-market → bob, Enterprise → charlie — set assigned_to automatically before saving. Need: POST /api/leads (submit + auto-route), GET /api/leads (list), GET /api/leads/new (only status='new').

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Leads table:
  name, required
  email, required
  s
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend

owner is 'demo@example.com'

database is local memory

create a Leads table:
  name, required
  email, required
  company
  size, default 'SMB'
  assigned_to
  status, default 'new'

allow signup and login

# Route based on company size
define function get_assigned_to(size):
  if size is 'Enterprise':
    send back 'charlie'
  if size is 'Mid-market':
    send back 'bob'
  send back 'alice'

# POST endpoint - submit and auto-route
when user sends lead to /api/leads:
  validate lead:
    name is text, required
    email is text, required
  assigned = get_assigned_to(lead's size)
  lead's assigned_to is assigned
  saved = save lead to Leads
  send back saved with status 201

# GET all leads
when user calls GET /api/leads:
  send back all Leads

# GET only new leads
when user calls GET /api/leads/new:
  send back all Leads where status is 'new'

# Frontend page
page 'Leads' at '/':
  heading 'Submit a Lead'
  lead_name = ''
  lead_email = ''
  lead_company = ''
  lead_size is 'SMB'
  
  'Name' as text input saved as lead_name
  'Email' as text input saved as lead_email
  'Company' as text input saved as lead_company
  'Size' as dropdown with ['SMB', 'Mid-market', 'Enterprise'] saved as lead_size
  
  button 'Submit Lead':
    result = post to '/api/leads' sending {name: lead_name, email: lead_email, company: lead_company, size: lead_size}
    lead_name is ''
    lead_email is ''
    lead_company is ''
    lead_size is 'SMB'
